name: Fedora / Red Hat shim
cve-notes: shim 15.6 and earlier had CVE-2023-40546/40547/40548/40549/40550 (buffer overflows); 15.8 is the current post-CVE release.
notes: Fedora shim is signed by Microsoft's UEFI CA which Secure Boot chains of trust. Internally, shim verifies grub2 / systemd-boot against the Fedora CA (enrolled in MokList). Measured on PCR 4 via EV_EFI_BOOT_SERVICES_APPLICATION.
